quotes.text: We're a cutting-edge technology company, constantly taking on new challenges in the worlds of milliseconds and terabytes.
quotes.heading: Hello. Facebook is hiring.

quotes.text: We need help from people who like to move fast, tackle the big stuff, and have an immediate impact.
quotes.heading: Hello. Facebook is hiring.

quotes.text: Our employees build and create technology that fundamentally changes how hundreds of millions of people around the world connect and share.
quotes.heading: Hello. Facebook is hiring.

quotes.text: No matter what part of Facebook you join, you'll be building something big and new.
At our Menlo Park headquarters, we also offer free breakfast, lunch and dinner at our Cafe.
In fact, we insist on them.
Be bold We’re determined to build a better, more connected world for everyone.
quotes.heading: What’s it like to work at Facebook?

quotes.text: When you’re in charge of making a difference, there’s no limit to what you can do.
quotes.heading: What’s it like to work at Facebook?

quotes.text: Connecting the world takes every one of us Move fast Connecting people, building community and bringing the world closer together happens in real time.
quotes.heading: What’s it like to work at Facebook?

quotes.text: From engineers to designers and marketers, we empower the people who work at Facebook to make an impact.
quotes.heading: What’s it like to work at Facebook?

quotes.text: We work quickly and collaboratively to build smarter, more meaningful solutions on a global scale.
quotes.heading: What’s it like to work at Facebook?

quotes.text: Every day, we redefine and build a future that’s more open, accessible, and focused on human connection.
quotes.heading: Join us in connecting the world.

quotes.text: We’re building more than future technology — we’re building a community of creators and developers.
quotes.heading: Engage with big ideas and brilliant people

quotes.text: Join us to build the future of human connection and the technology that makes it possible.
We do more than make great technologies — we create awe and inspiration.
quotes.heading: We build awesome things

quotes.text: Explore our featured roles and join our mission to build the future of human connection.

quotes.text: This breakthrough tech allows people to answer messages, capture high-quality audio and video, and use Meta AI on a private in-lens display with intuitive, on-wrist controls — proving what's possible when you push the limits of AI in wearables.
quotes.heading: We build awesome things

quotes.text: Our Meta Quest headsets take virtual reality beyond entertainment, driving breakthroughs in education, travel and other significant areas.
